Operation 'voidPreauthorizedPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) explicit input requirement (payment ID), (2) state validation context, (3) return value specification, (4) side effects (irreversibility and impact on future captures). This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Releases pre-authorization funds from a previously created preauthorized payment.
data.description_suggestion: Voids a preauthorized payment by releasing the pre-authorized funds back to the payer. Requires the payment ID as a path parameter. The preauthorized payment must be in a valid state to be voided. Returns the updated payment details with void status. This operation is irreversible and will prevent any future capture attempts on this preauthorization.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) explicit input requirement (payment ID), (2) state validation context, (3) return value specification, (4) side effects (irreversibility and impact on future captures). This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'generateAccountStatement' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. This enables AI agents to understand what request parameters to prepare and how to handle the response appropriately.

data.current_description: Generates a statement from the business account and returns the statement file content.
data.description_suggestion: Generates an account statement for the authenticated merchant's business account based on specified criteria. Accepts an AccountStatementRequest containing filtering parameters such as date range and transaction types. Returns the generated statement as a file in the response body. The statement is generated asynchronously and may take time to complete depending on the account activity volume.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Added: (1) input schema reference (AccountStatementRequest) and what parameters it contains, (2) explicit output format (file in response body), (3) side effect context (asynchronous processing and potential delays). This enables AI agents to understand what request parameters to prepare and how to handle the response appropriately.

message: Operation 'createPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about what data is required and what is returned. Enhanced description specifies input requirements (payer, target, order items, payment method), clarifies the return value (Payment object with ID and status), and explains the side effect (immediate processing with status dependent on payment method).

data.current_description: Establishes a payment for order processing via various payment methods.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new payment transaction for order processing. Accepts payment details including payer information, target merchant, order items, and selected payment method. Returns a Payment object containing the payment ID, status, and transaction details. The payment is immediately processed and its status depends on the selected payment method and merchant configuration.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what data is required and what is returned. Enhanced description specifies input requirements (payer, target, order items, payment method), clarifies the return value (Payment object with ID and status), and explains the side effect (immediate processing with status dependent on payment method).

message: Operation 'refundPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about input parameters (refund amount optionality), return value structure, and side effects (status update, fund return). Enhanced description clarifies these aspects to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and effects.

data.current_description: Processes a refund for a previously completed payment.
data.description_suggestion: Processes a refund for a previously completed payment. Requires the payment ID and optional refund amount (full refund if not specified). Returns a PaymentResult object indicating the refund status and transaction details. The original payment status is updated to reflect the refund, and funds are returned to the payer's original payment method.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about input parameters (refund amount optionality), return value structure, and side effects (status update, fund return). Enhanced description clarifies these aspects to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and effects.

message: Operation 'createRecurringPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description assumes knowledge of recurring payment modes without explaining context. Enhanced description clarifies the prerequisite (established recurring payment), specifies input parameters (recurring payment ID, optional amount), explains the return value (Payment object), and clarifies the operational constraint (ON_DEMAND mode requirement) for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Creates a recurring payment based on a previously established recurring payment in ON_DEMAND mode.
data.description_suggestion: Triggers an on-demand recurring payment charge based on a previously established recurring payment agreement. Requires the recurring payment ID and optional custom amount. Returns a Payment object containing the new payment transaction details and status. This operation only works for recurring payments configured in ON_DEMAND mode and creates an immediate charge against the stored payment instrument.
data.reasoning: Original description assumes knowledge of recurring payment modes without explaining context. Enhanced description clarifies the prerequisite (established recurring payment), specifies input parameters (recurring payment ID, optional amount), explains the return value (Payment object), and clarifies the operational constraint (ON_DEMAND mode requirement) for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'cancelRecurringPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on return value and side effects. Enhanced description specifies the return type (PaymentResult), clarifies the primary side effect (no future charges), explains the status change (CANCELLED), and addresses the edge case of pending charges to improve AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Cancels the recurrence of a previously created recurring payment.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels the recurrence of a previously created recurring payment. Requires the recurring payment ID. Returns a PaymentResult object confirming the cancellation status. After cancellation, no further charges will be made against the recurring payment agreement, and the recurring payment status is updated to CANCELLED. Any pending charges are not affected.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on return value and side effects. Enhanced description specifies the return type (PaymentResult), clarifies the primary side effect (no future charges), explains the status change (CANCELLED), and addresses the edge case of pending charges to improve AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'capturePreauthorizedPayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description mentions partial/full capture but lacks input parameter details and return value information. Enhanced description clarifies the capture amount parameter (optional, defaults to full authorization), specifies the return type (PaymentResult), and explains the side effect (status update to CAPTURED and fund transfer) for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Captures funds from a preauthorized payment, fully or partially.
data.description_suggestion: Captures funds from a preauthorized payment, either in full or for a partial amount. Requires the preauthorized payment ID and optional capture amount (full authorization amount if not specified). Returns a PaymentResult object containing the capture transaction details and status. The preauthorized payment status is updated to CAPTURED, and funds are transferred to the merchant account.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions partial/full capture but lacks input parameter details and return value information. Enhanced description clarifies the capture amount parameter (optional, defaults to full authorization), specifies the return type (PaymentResult), and explains the side effect (status update to CAPTURED and fund transfer) for comprehensive AI agent understanding.
